message:
fix: create new worktree before removing old one in RepairWorktree

Previously, the old worktree was destroyed before attempting to create
the new one. If new worktree creation failed, the polecat was left with
no worktree at all. Now creates to a temp path first, removes old only
after success, then renames into place.

Fixes gt-9zzuh

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
